Sibling tokens are unique across canonical names, intermediate nodes, and
aliases, mirroring the cli library's startup rule at wire time.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26

require github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli v0.1.0

replace github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli => CLIDIR
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- shared/shared.go --
package shared

import "github.com/gofabrik/fabrik/cli"

//fabrik:cli:command name=alpha alias=beta
func Alpha(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command name=beta
func Beta(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command name=gamma alias=shared-alias
func Gamma(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command name=delta alias=shared-alias
func Delta(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command path="database migrate"
func Migrate(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }

//fabrik:cli:command name=jobs alias=database
func Jobs(ctx cli.Context) error { return nil }
-- want/diags --
error: shared/shared.go:5:1: alias "beta" collides with a sibling command or group
  help: the cli library requires sibling names and aliases to be unique
error: shared/shared.go:14:1: alias "shared-alias" is already used by a sibling declared at $WORK/shared/shared.go:11:1
error: shared/shared.go:20:1: alias "database" collides with a sibling command or group
  help: the cli library requires sibling names and aliases to be unique
